name: Main Squad
description: Primary athletes representing the national team in major competitions

name: Reserve Squad
description: Backup athletes who may replace main squad members if needed

name: Candidate Squad
description: Athletes considered for future promotion to the national team

name: Development Squad
description: Young or developing athletes being prepared for higher level teams

name: Olympic Pool
description: Athletes selected as potential Olympic team members

name: Training Squad
description: Athletes included in national team training camps but not official competition roster

name: Guest Athlete
description: Athlete temporarily training or competing with the team
